transcript_facts:
* The patient reports fatigue for the past two months.
* The patient denies blood in stool.
* Hemoglobin is 8.2.
* The clinician plans an anemia profile.
* The clinician starts Lasix 40 mg daily.
* The patient reports chest pain, occurring three times per week.
* The patient describes the chest pain as a burning sensation.
* The patient reports the chest pain is located in the center of the chest.
* The patient reports the chest pain occurs when walking.
* The clinician hears a systolic ejection murmur of 3/6.
* The clinician observes clear lungs.
* The clinician observes no carotid bruits.
* The patient has healed surgical scars on the right wrist.
* The clinician continues the patient on aspirin.
* The clinician orders a toprol.
* The clinician orders a lipid panel.
* The clinician orders a cardiac stress test.
